name: suprava-content-agent
description: Research-first content pipeline for Suprava across research, writing, and humanization.

interface.shortDescription: Research-first content briefs and platform writing flows.
interface.longDescription: Finds real stories, turns them into source-backed briefs, and hands them off to LinkedIn, X, and YouTube writing flows with a mandatory humanizer pass.
defaultPrompt: Research 5 angles on a content topic for Suprava.
Turn this campaign story into a LinkedIn post.
Build a YouTube script from this research brief.
